description: The Matsuba-kai is a yakuza organization based in Tokyo, Japan, founded in March 1953 from remnants of the Sekine-gumi and Fujita-gumi. It is a designated yakuza group with an estimated 280 active members as of 2024. The group is a member of the Kantō Hatsuka-kai federation and has been involved in drug smuggling, violent feuds, and protests.

country_links.evidence_quote: In the 1980s the gang was caught smuggling 12 kilos of heroin into Canada .
country_links.context: The Matsuba-kai smuggled heroin into Canada.
